CustomField.description: Human-readable period label such as Week 1 of March 2026.
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(Period_Type__c) = "Weekly", "Week " & TEXT(CEILING(DAY(Entry_Date__c) / 7)) & " of " & CASE(MONTH(Entry_Date__c), 1, "January", 2, "February", 3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6, "June", 7, "July", 8, "August", 9, "September", 10, "October", 11, "November", 12, "December", "Unknown") & " " & TEXT(YEAR(Entry_Date__c)), CASE(MONTH(Entry_Date__c), 1, "January", 2, "February", 3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6, "June", 7, "July", 8, "August", 9, "September", 10, "October", 11, "November", 12, "December", "Unknown") & " " & TEXT(YEAR(Entry_Date__c)))
CustomField.label: Period Label
